case_title: ROBERT G SCOTT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
